milestone_result: v5.0 tightened the first Hg1223 campaign into a runbook, diagnostic package, and route-gate system
next_step: execute the instrumented Stage A Hg1223 campaign and classify outcomes through the Phase 20 evidence ladder and Phase 21 route gates
backup_contingency: if the first instrumented campaign fails cleanly or stalls below T2, strengthen the bilayer nickelate route into a co-primary discovery program
